steps.title: Define acceptance criterion (CS-010 §7.1) — NOT DONE IN SN5

steps.title: Resistance measurement
steps.notes: ~40 Ω outer CF to can end surface (2026-05-25) vs <5 Ω needed

steps.title: Rework by sanding — FAILED
steps.notes: cans punctured at the taper during sanding (2026-05-27) — CS-009 §7.2 / CS-010 §7.4 now prohibit this

steps.title: Design pivot: epoxy + copper conductive paths
steps.notes: the CS-010 §7.1 decision-point lesson: CF wrap was the wrong path for this geometry
